title: Lazy Popcorn Feast
description: A buttery and crispy middle-eastern dish featuring toffee popcorn for a lazy Sunday treat that is also high-protein-friendly.
instructions: Combine the popcorn kernels, unsalted butter, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Drizzle with cooking oil. Add toffee bits on top of the mixture evenly.
Spread the mixture evenly onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10 minutes or until the kernels start popping vigorously.
Turn off the oven, leave the door slightly open, and let it rest in the warm air for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Carefully remove from the oven to prevent burns.
